name: CV PDF Import - PDF to HTML via Claude

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $json.anthropic_model, max_tokens: 8192, system: $json.system_prompt, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: [{ type: 'document', source: { type: 'base64', media_type: 'application/pdf', data: $json.pdf_base64 } }, { type: 'text', text: $json.user_prompt }] }] }) }}
